# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash tests/run-vectors.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Commits follow the conventional format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has a date-stamped entry for this change
- [ ] README updated if the change is user-visible

### Only if `data/factors.json` or `data/prices.json` changed

- [ ] `tests/methodology-vectors.json` updated with the new expected outputs
- [ ] `METHODOLOGY.md` updated, every new number reproducible from a cited source
